basic_details.job_title: ISI Chennai Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Statistical Institute Chennai Centre has released the official Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 1 Project Assistant vacancy has been announced under the Indian Statistical Institute Chennai Centre Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with an M.E./ MCA/ M.Tech or equivalent in the relevant disciplines, or an M.Sc. in Statistics, Applied Statistics and Analytics, Mathematics, Physics, Electronics, or Computer Science with First Class are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 22 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in int

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation may be given to outstanding candidates or candidates with relevant experience as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E/ MCA/ M.Tech or equivalent in Computer Science/Electrical Engineering/Electronics/Information Technology, M.Sc. in Statistics/Applied Statistics and Analytics/Mathematics/Physics/Electronics/Computer Science, All through First Class, Desirable: Good Knowledge of Algebra, Category Theory and Game Theory
qualification.details: M.E/MCA/M.Tech or equivalent degree in Computer Science/Electrical Engineering/Electronics/Information Technology, or M.Sc., in Statistics/Applied Statistics and Analytics/Mathematics/Physics/Electronics/Computer Science. All through First Class. Desirable: Good Knowledge of Algebra, Category Theory and Game Theory.

content_sections.heading: ISI Chennai Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ISI Chennai Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ISI Chennai Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ISI Chennai Project Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
ISI Chennai Project Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.E/MCA/M.Tech or equivalent degree in Computer Science/Electrical Engineering/Electronics/Information Technology, or M.Sc., in Statistics/Applied Statistics and Analytics/Mathematics/Physics/Electronics/Computer Science. All through First Class. Desirable: Good Knowledge of Algebra, Category Theory and Game Theory.

content_sections.heading: ISI Chennai Project Assistant Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation may be given to outstanding candidates or candidates with relevant experience as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: ISI Chennai Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ISI Chennai Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ISI Chennai Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ISI Chennai recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Indian Statistical Institute Chennai Centre recruitment is Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is not explicitly mentioned as a deadline for submission, as it is a walk-in interview. Candidates should attend the interview on the specified date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Assistant role is scheduled for 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have M.E/MCA/M.Tech or equivalent in Computer Science/Electrical Engineering/Electronics/Information Technology, or M.Sc. in Statistics/Applied Statistics and Analytics/Mathematics/Physics/Electronics/Computer Science, all through First Class.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any desirable qualification for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Yes, a desirable qualification is good knowledge of Algebra, Category Theory, and Game Theory.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Project Assistant position ranges from Rs. 31,000/- to Rs. 36,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.
